description_long: This is a floor-standing whiteboard with a rectangular writing surface supported by a minimalist, black metal frame. The writing surface is smooth and likely made of a glossy, white material, bordered at the top by a dark strip, possibly for structural reinforcement or to hold a flip chart. The frame consists of four slender legs, splayed outward for stability, and a horizontal support bar at the rear. At the bottom of the writing surface, there is a tray for holding markers or erasers. The overall design is utilitarian and modern, suitable for use in offices, classrooms, or public urban spaces. The whiteboard is lightweight and portable, with no visible wheels.
description: A modern, floor-standing whiteboard with a smooth white writing surface, black metal frame, and a marker tray at the bottom.
description_view_0: Rear view showing the black metal frame, support bar, and the back of the writing surface.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the thin profile of the whiteboard and the protruding marker tray.
description_view_2: Front view displaying the full white writing surface, dark top border, and marker tray.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the slimness of the board and the frame's angled legs.
